message:
fix: address 5 bugs (#104, #105, #106, #107, #108)

- #108: WAL never checkpoints — add periodic WAL checkpoint (every 50
  mutations) via PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE), plus a final checkpoint
  in Drop impl to flush WAL on close. Prevents unbounded WAL growth.

- #107: DB errors silently swallowed in config delete — replace
  unwrap_or(false) with match that logs a warning and prints to stderr
  when delete_config fails, instead of silently proceeding.

- #106: sync reads issue prefix only from DB — use full merged config
  layer (YAML/env/CLI/DB) via config::load_config + id_config_from_layer
  so project config.yaml prefix is respected during import.

- #105: get_value skips key normalization — normalize keys in get_value
  the same way get_startup_value does (lowercase + replace _ with -),
  so issue_prefix and issue-prefix are treated as the same key.

- #104: missing column source_system on older databases — bump
  CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION from 1 to 2 so databases previously migrated
  to version 1 (without source_system) re-run apply_schema and get the
  column added via ensure_columns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
